prompt: We've been doing e2e validation for 3 months. Want to know: are we catching real bugs or generating false FAILs that waste time investigating?
expected_output: Skill directs Phase 1 to collect past validation reports (PASS/FAIL verdicts) and deployment outcomes (incidents post-deploy). Phase 2 calculates false PASS rate (bugs found in prod that validation missed) and false FAIL rate (investigations that found nothing real). Phase 4 confidence formula weights detection (1 - false_pass_rate) and accuracy (1 - false_fail_rate). Produces report: if false FAIL >15%, validation criteria too brittle; if false PASS >5%, journeys missing.
